title: Verify feedback flag injection into build stage
description: Verification test that @kody --feedback "Use functional style" correctly injects the feedback flag into the build stage. Check logs for 'feedback:' line during build stage. The workflow passes --feedback via ARGS variable and the engine logs it when the build stage runs.
existing_patterns: .github/workflows/kody.yml:250 - FEEDBACK arg passed to kody-engine: `[ -n "$FEEDBACK" ] && ARGS="$ARGS --feedback \"$FEEDBACK\""`
